title: Introduction
description: An introduction to the Acme documentation platform
content:
## What is Acme?

Acme is a documentation platform that turns your codebase into production-ready documentation in minutes.

## How It Works

Point it at your repo, and a 4-phase agentic pipeline explores your code, plans a documentation structure, writes every page, and reviews the result.

Edit the output in a rich block editor with drag-and-drop MDX components, then deploy to the Cloudflare edge with a single command.

## Key Features

- **AI-powered generation** from real source code
- **Rich block editor** with custom MDX components
- **Edge deployment** via Cloudflare Pages
- **Custom domains** with automatic SSL
- **Full-text search** built in
- **Dark and light themes** with customization

## Architecture Overview

The platform consists of several key modules:

| Module | Purpose |
|--------|--------|
| Editor | Rich block editing with BlockNote |
| Generator | AI documentation pipeline |
| Publisher | Static site generation and deployment |
| CLI | Command-line interface for all operations |

## When to Use Acme

Acme is ideal for teams that want professional documentation without the overhead of maintaining it manually.

## Next Steps

Get started with the [Quick Start](/getting-started/quickstart) guide or explore the [API Reference](/reference/api-overview).
